allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({'id':d['id'],'contentFormat':d['contentFormat'],'slug':d.get\('slug',''\)},indent=2\)\) for d in data['data'][:3]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('contentFormat:', d.get\('contentFormat'\)\); c=d.get\('content',''\); print\('content type:', type\(c\).__name__\); print\('content preview:', json.dumps\(c, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500] if c else 'None'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('contentFormat:', d.get\('contentFormat'\)\); c=d.get\('content',''\); print\('content type:', type\(c\).__name__\); print\('content preview:', json.dumps\(c, ensure_ascii=False\)[:1000] if c else 'None'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
